asserts.note: handling-targets v1 Hatch Washboard contact-loss (existing band, reused verbatim per pre-read). METRIC CORRECTED 2026-07-13 (wave-2 live finding): band provenance is handling-targets feel-heuristic 3 = PER-WHEEL IsGrounded loss; the frozen contactLossPct (full-airborne ticks) read 0.0 on every car live, so the assert now uses wheelContactLossPct (avg % of wheel contact lost), band VALUES unchanged. v1 -- pre-measurement
handling-targets v1 Hatch Tire-bounce-quality post-settle ceiling, reused as the washboard no-resonance check (testing-harness.md §6.2 lists settleS for washboard). v1 -- pre-measurement

handling-targets v1 Coupe Washboard contact-loss -- performance suspension tracks rough ground well at speed (existing band, reused; per-wheel metric per hatch-entry correction note). v1 -- pre-measurement
handling-targets v1 Coupe Tire-bounce-quality post-settle ceiling (stiff sport dampers), reused for washboard no-resonance. v1 -- pre-measurement

handling-targets v1 Kart Washboard contact-loss -- DELIBERATELY up (small wheels/short travel is the kart's tire-bounce signature, not a defect), existing band reused; per-wheel metric per hatch-entry correction note. v1 -- pre-measurement
handling-targets v1 Kart Tire-bounce-quality post-settle ceiling (light chassis settles fast despite bouncing more), reused for washboard no-resonance. v1 -- pre-measurement

handling-targets v1 Pickup Washboard contact-loss -- DELIBERATELY the roster's best (long travel + soft 1.50 Hz springs), existing band reused; per-wheel metric per hatch-entry correction note. v1 -- pre-measurement

no dedicated Pickup row in the handling-targets Tire-bounce-quality table (authored pre-pickup); extrapolated from the pickup's own Ramp-jump settle ceiling (also 1.5 s, the roster's softest/longest-travel suspension sits at the global ceiling on purpose). v1 -- pre-measurement, flagged as extrapolation
